title: Ship's Articles
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Ship's Articles''' was a set of rules of [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] conduct authored by [[Celis Mott]]. Many [[Rebel privateer]]s would adhere to those rules. They were as follows:

#''Every member shall have a vote, when votes are called, and equal share of provisions found.''
#''All booty shall be doled out fairly, under the watch of a group elected by the crew. Defrauding the ship and crew shall be punished by marooning.''
#''No gambling or intoxicants on duty.''
#''Weapons and vacuum suits to be kept clean and serviceable at all times.''
#''No minors or idle family.''
#''Desertion of one's battle station is punishable by marooning or death, at vote of the crew.''
#''No fighting on board. Personal disputes are to be settled planetside by duel.''
#''No retirement or disbanding until every crew member has shared 100000 credits. The crippled shall receive 80000 credits out of the public stock, and for lesser wounds proportionally.''
#''The captain, engineer, and weapons officer shall receive two shares. The other officers shall receive one and a half shares. All other crew members shall receive one share.''
